expectations.evidence: Note says 'Third antenatal visit' and '26 weeks gestation' but does not use the WHO 8-contact model terminology. It is labeled as 'ANC Visit Note — 26 Weeks' rather than identifying this as Contact 3 of the standardized 8-contact schedule.

expectations.text: GDM screening recommended based on risk factors (BMI, family history, elevated glucose)
expectations.evidence: Assessment section identifies GDM risk factors: previous macrosomic baby (4.2 kg), family history of diabetes, overweight (BMI 29), and elevated random glucose. States 'This warrants further evaluation for gestational diabetes.'

expectations.text: Oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) or equivalent mentioned
expectations.evidence: Plan states 'Order glucose tolerance test' and mentions 'A formal glucose challenge or OGTT should be arranged.' However, the specific 75g OGTT protocol with WHO diagnostic criteria is not provided.

expectations.text: Dietary counseling for GDM prevention recommended
expectations.evidence: Plan item 2 states 'Counsel on reducing sugar-sweetened beverages and refined carbohydrates. Encourage balanced meals with more whole grains, vegetables, and lean protein.'
